additional_diagnostics.message: 未检测到 Jovi 智能优化，启动可能未享受到系统加速
suggestions: 检查应用是否在 Jovi 白名单中
联系 vivo 系统工程师确认优化策略

additional_diagnostics.message: vivo 系统服务 ${server_process} 调用耗时 ${dur_ms}ms
suggestions: 联系 vivo 系统侧确认服务状态

additional_steps.description: 检查 Jovi 和 OriginOS 优化是否生效
additional_steps.name: vivo 智能优化检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as optimization_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*Jovi*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*OriginOS*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*vivo*Boost*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*SmartEngine*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: vivo 系统服务调用
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  server_process,
  client_dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  COUNT(*) as call_count
FROM android_binder_txns
WHERE client_process GLOB '${package}*'
  AND (server_process GLOB '*vivo*'
       OR server_process GLOB '*bbk*'
       OR server_process GLOB '*jovi*')
  AND client_ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND client_ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
GROUP BY server_process
ORDER BY SUM(client_dur) DESC

additional_steps.name: 内存优化状态
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as memory_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*MemoryOptimiz*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*freeze*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Freeze*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

meta.description: 针对 vivo OriginOS 优化的启动分析，包含 Jovi 智能优化检测
